item.title: Return of the Meme: 1076 (chicken of executive function)
item.description:
It's morning. Bread and coffee time.
Don't touch the Cactus.
.... shit
Dimetrodon by Natalia Jagielska
Poor Dunkolesteus. What a loss.
Spooky.
The White Bellbird is the Loudest bird in the world; one type of call peaks at 125 decibels: about the same as a pneumatic drill. Check one out here, it's wild--barely sounds like a living creature. https://youtu.be/nREYBx4eZf8?si=N9pGTYUX09Sr1E2e
Gonna call @sisipherr out on this one.
For once, doesn't apply to me.
I'm out of PTO thanks to the whole medical debacle earlier this year at work, but sometimes you need to take a vacation anyway, and because this time of year is so slow, I'm really only missing one day of work for my upcoming adventure.
Yo, @SecretHarpy let's suffer together
Oops.
All of you, I'm glad you're here, and I truly mean that. Even the trolls.
"Also, he's being carried on a litter by wasps for some reason"
I may not make the best money, but the Sedona outdoors is one of the best offices I've ever worked at, and as an autistic person, I'm effectively being paid to infodump about many of special interests: birds, botany, and bgeology.
Hopefully, this card helps someone today.
I have, after some exploration and examination through the last few years, concluded I am indeed male, though there are some days when my brain is over-stressed, where I definitely lean towards wishing I was a non-corporeal energy entity, which I guess might be considered non-binary by some folk. That being said, would totally wear a skirt; skirts and kilts are especially comfortable in summer, and hide extra knives. The Scots were right all along. Or just long tunics. However, can't get away with a kilt at work; we have to sort of dress like cowboys. Which, honestly, ain't bad.
Pippin tax! Pippin's message of the day: "Glory Pippin. Okay."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Feel good meme dump
item.description:
Practice makes easier. It's neurological. Emotional understanding can change everything.
It's the goal.
Don't be afraid to succeed.
The thous are a lot but the info is relevant
As an AuDHDer, I thought this was impossible...boy was I wrong. There are tools to help shift our mindset, we just need to find them and keep...at...it
You...matter.
Get the happy hormones hacks...doing it consciously makes a huge difference!
Happiness
Nomnomnom
Cat tax. My friends beautiful feline freeloader
item.dc:creator: Autittuderp

item.title: I’ve been on a binge of some of my favorite 90s movies, and boy, does My Cousin Vinny hold up. I think about all these blockbusters we get, and sometimes all I want is a feel-good comedy.

item.title: 42 Dump pickup

item.title: Gutters and Strikes
item.description:
This past year, I started going to ComiCons, and decided to start going as The Dude from The Big Lebowski. I got contacted a couple weeks ago by an old friend who saw my photos on Facebook. Their dad has been having a rough year, and they wanted to do something to cheer him up on his birthday. He is a huge fan of the movie, and can be heard quoting it almost every day. So the plan was to have The Dude crash his birthday party for a photo op! He absolutely loved it!!! MOST VIRAL EDIT: Wow, that was fast!!! Thanks for the upvotes! I'm still pretty new to this cosplaying thing, but I love doing something that makes people smile! If you want to keep tabs on me, you can LIKE my Facebook page - The Dude at Cons: https://www.facebook.com/thedudeatcons/
“This aggression will not stand, man!”
This is what happens when you hug a Stranger in The Alps!
It’s down there somewhere - let me take another look.
The Dude Abides. I don’t know about you, but I take comfort in that.
item.dc:creator: stoots24
